message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive robot-status validation (ntm-k5pv)

- TestRobotStatusAllAgentStates: validates JSON schema for idle, working, error, unknown states
- TestRobotStatusVerboseMode: validates extra fields in --verbose
- TestRobotStatusErrorHandling: validates graceful degradation
- TestRobotStatusFieldStability: ensures critical fields are present
